faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in North Castle, NY?
faqs.answer: North Castle properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and acrobat ants. Carpenter ants are particularly prevalent due to the area's wooded environment and older homes with wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to provide the most effective treatment approach.
